description: An attorney needs to file a document that contains highly confidential trade secrets, requiring it to be filed under seal.

nodes.task_description: Draft a motion to file under seal, explaining to the court why the information is confidential and requires protection.
Create a redacted, public version of the document with the confidential information blacked out.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates the public version of the file.

nodes.task_description: Electronically file the motion to seal, the redacted public version, and submit the unredacted version to the court through the proper sealed filing procedure.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly follows the complex e-filing procedure for sealed documents.
